{{Discussion top}}
__NOTOC__

'''Voting ended at midnight UTC on 30 November 2015'''. The theme was '''100 years later'''. Each pair of images captures the same subject, but approximately 100 years apart. With a few images, the historical photo cannot be uploaded to Commons and a link is provided. Please do not penalise entries where the historical image is missing or of poor quality -- we are judging the modern photos that were uploaded for the challenge.

{{Commons:Photo challenge/Voting header/{{SuperFallback|Commons:Photo challenge/Voting header}}}}

*{{1/3*}} Cool. Love it. -- '''Yet another person''' 18:32, 2 January 2014 (UTC)
*{{0/3*}} Beautiful -- '''Someone else''' 13:30 3 January 2014 (UTC)

===5. Bakı Şəhəri İcra Hakimiyyəti Binası===
{|
|- valign="top"
|width="100pt" |[[File:Baksovet011.JPG|none|thumb|x294px|~1918 'Bakı Şurası' Binası (Hal hazırda Bakı Şəhəri İcra hakimiyyəti)]]
|width="100pt" |[[File:Bakı Şəhəri İcra Hakimiyyəti Binası.JPG|none|thumb|x294px|2013 Bakı Şəhəri İcra Hakimiyyəti Binası, Azərbaycan [{{filepath:Bakı Şəhəri İcra Hakimiyyəti Binası.JPG}}<br>''(Full size image)'']]]

<!-- Vote below this line -->
*{{0/3*}} It is interesting how there were more telephone lines strung up almost a hundred years ago than there are today. They are probably now underground. [[User:BD2412|<font style="background:lightgreen">''BD2412''</font>]] [[User talk:BD2412|'''T''']] 13:20, 3 November 2015 (UTC)

===12. 2015-09-05 11-30-22 fusille-souriant===
{|
|- valign="top"
|width="100pt" |[[File:Blanco portrait.svg|none|thumb|x290px|Lieu où a été pris en photo le fusillé souriant, à Belfort. La photo du fusillé souriant étant, à ce jour, encore protégée par les droits d'auteur, voici quelques sites web où l'on peut la trouver : [http://memoire-net.org/article.php3?id_article=141 ici] et [http://se-rememorer.e-monsite.com/pages/partie-ii-les-temoignages-historiques-permettent-a-la-memoire-collective-de-subsiter/le-fusille-de-belfort.html ici].]]
|width="100pt" |[[File:2015-09-05 11-30-22 fusille-souriant.jpg|none|thumb|x290px|Lieu où a été pris en photo le fusillé souriant, à Belfort. [{{filepath:2015-09-05 11-30-22 fusille-souriant.jpg}}<br>''(Full size image)'']]]
|}
'''Creator:''' [[User:ComputerHotline|ComputerHotline]] '''Taken:''' 05 September 2015 '''Uploaded:''' 05 September 2015 '''Size''': 5997 × 3996 (23.9 MP)
<!-- Vote below this line -->
*{{3/3*}} Most powerful contrast, shame the original isn't on the page, or it would be first! &#8209;&#8209;<span style="text-shadow:grey 0.15em 0.15em 0.1em">[[User:Yodin|Yodin]]</span><span style="text-shadow:grey 0.25em 0.25em 0.12em"><sup>[[User talk:Yodin|T]]</sup></span> 22:30, 19 November 2015 (UTC)

===30. Gare de Villeurbanne 2015===
{|*{{3/3*}} -- Zause01 18:47, 28 November 2015 (UTC)
|- valign="top"
|width="100pt" |[[File:Gare de Villeurbanne.jpg|none|thumb|x267px|[[:fr:Villeurbanne|Villeurbanne]]'s station in early 20th century (postcard).]]

===49. BriarcliffOutlook4 (2014)===
{|

===86. Pharmacie 2015===
{|*{{1/3*}} -- Zause01 18:49, 28 November 2015 (UTC)
|- valign="top"
|width="100pt" |[[File:Quincaillerie 1915.jpg|none|thumb|x416px|Quincaillerie-épicerie vers 1915]]
|width="100pt" |[[File:Pharmacie 2015.JPG|none|thumb|x416px|Pharmacie en 2015 [{{filepath:Pharmacie 2015.JPG}}<br>''(Full size image)'']]]
|}
